review_summary: initial changes don't update value. Works but confusing if expected to sync.

issues_found.title: Doesn't update on prop change
issues_found.explanation: useState ignores prop changes after mount.
issues_found.fix: key or explicit sync if needed

review_summary: value change recreates callback. Memo defeated for value-dependent callbacks.

issues_found.title: Stability vs freshness
issues_found.explanation: If callback must use latest value, deps required.
issues_found.fix: OK as is OR ref pattern

issues_that_arent_issues: useCallback with deps is correct usage.
broader_pattern: Stable callbacks for memo'd children; ref for ever-fresh.

review_summary: Log happens only on success. If update succeeds and log fails, inconsistent.

issues_found.title: Log fail = lose record
issues_found.explanation: Update succeeded, log failed. No retry, no record.

review_summary: Correctly narrows inside callback. Fine.

issues_found.title: Captures latest user
issues_found.explanation: Closure captures user at click time. If user becomes null between render and click... edge.

broader_pattern: Narrowing in callbacks captures closure value.

code_under_review: <th onClick={() => sort('name')}>Name {sortBy === 'name' ? '▼' : ''}</th>
review_summary: th onClick = not keyboard. No aria-sort. Indicator visual only.

issues_found.title: Not keyboard
issues_found.explanation: Standard

issues_found.title: SR doesn't know sort state
issues_found.explanation: aria-sort='ascending' etc.

fixed_code:
<th aria-sort={sortBy === 'name' ? (sortDir === 'asc' ? 'ascending' : 'descending') : 'none'}>
  <button onClick={() => sort('name')}>
    Name {sortBy === 'name' && (sortDir === 'asc' ? '▲' : '▼')}
  </button>
</th>

review_summary: Independent fine. If always updated together, single state.

issues_found.title: Could be one
issues_found.explanation: If always updated together, one state. If independent, separate is fine.

code_under_review: <button onClick={() => reset()}>Clear</button>
review_summary: User filled long form, clicks Clear accidentally → loses everything.

issues_found.title: Destructive without warning
issues_found.explanation: Accidental click loses data.

broader_pattern: Destructive actions need confirmation or undo.

review_summary: For fast loads <300ms, spinner flashes. UX: delay showing.

issues_found.title: Flash
issues_found.explanation: Fast load shows spinner briefly then content.

broader_pattern: Delay loading indicator for snappy feel.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Delay loading UX for fast response.

review_summary: 6 lodash sub-imports. Several can be replaced with native or smaller libs.

issues_found.title: Some natively available
issues_found.explanation: pick/omit are 5-line helpers. groupBy in newer JS (Object.groupBy stage 3).

what_makes_this_review_senior: Inline trivial helpers; keep lodash for complex.

code_under_review:
const [resetKey, setResetKey] = useState(0);
<ErrorBoundary resetKeys={[resetKey]}>
  <button onClick={() => setResetKey(Math.random())}>Reset</button>
  <Component />
</ErrorBoundary>
review_summary: Math.random as identifier. Predictable counter sufficient and clearer.

issues_found.title: Style
issues_found.explanation: Counter is clearer; random is overkill.

fixed_code:
const [resetKey, setResetKey] = useState(0);
<ErrorBoundary resetKeys={[resetKey]}>
  <button onClick={() => setResetKey(k => k + 1)}>Reset</button>
  <Component />
</ErrorBoundary>

review_summary: Cleanup captures value at mount time. Save sends initial value, not current.

issues_found.title: Stale closure
issues_found.explanation: Mount: value='abc'. User edits to 'xyz'. Unmount: cleanup runs saveToServer('abc').

broader_pattern: useRef for latest value in cleanup.

review_summary: any prop type. Should be typed.

issues_found.title: No type
issues_found.explanation: Type props.

code_under_review: {user.website}
review_summary: user.website could be javascript: URL.

issues_found.title: javascript: scheme
issues_found.explanation: User-controlled URL. javascript:alert(1) executes on click.

what_makes_this_review_senior: URL scheme validation; render as text fallback.

review_summary: window in render = SSR crash + mismatch.

issues_found.title: SSR
issues_found.explanation: Standard

code_under_review:
const API = 'http://localhost:8080';
fetch(`${API}/api/data`);
review_summary: localhost ships to prod = broken.

issues_found.title: Wrong in prod
issues_found.explanation: Production has no localhost backend.

code_under_review: items.map((item, i) => <Row key={`row-${i}`} item={item} />)
review_summary: Prefix doesn't help; still index-keyed. Item add/remove breaks reconciliation.

issues_found.title: Index keys
issues_found.explanation: Standard

fixed_code: items.map(item => <Row key={item.id} item={item} />)

review_summary: Module-level fetch fires before app even mounts. Plus SSR fires on server.

issues_found.title: Fires on import
issues_found.explanation: Side effect at import. SSR runs it on server.

broader_pattern: No side effects at module level.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Lazy module init; no top-level side effects.

review_summary: Partial failure: stock reserved, card charged, email failed = silent. Worse: card charged, stock fails = inconsistent.

issues_found.title: Partial failures
issues_found.explanation: Each step succeeds independently. Failure mid-way leaves inconsistent state.

broader_pattern: Atomic transactions server-side; saga pattern client.

review_summary: OK actually. Nullish coalescing correctly defaults null/undefined.

issues_found.title: Correct
issues_found.explanation: Nullish coalescing is correct for null|undefined to default.

review_summary: Asterisk visual only. SR doesn't know required. Plus no aria-required.

issues_found.title: SR misses required
issues_found.explanation: Asterisk read as 'star'. Doesn't convey 'required'.

review_summary: Side effect in updater. Strict mode double-invokes = saves twice.

issues_found.title: Side effect
issues_found.explanation: Strict mode invokes setState updater twice. Save twice.

review_summary: watch triggers re-render every keystroke (if type is text). For select OK. Plus values for hidden fields retained.

issues_found.title: Re-renders
issues_found.explanation: For select, fires once per change. Fine.

issues_found.title: Submit includes hidden
issues_found.explanation: Switching type doesn't unregister hidden field. Old value submitted.

review_summary: useLayoutEffect blocks paint. For scroll, this is correct.

issues_found.title: Correct usage
issues_found.explanation: For DOM mutation that should happen before paint (scroll, focus), useLayoutEffect is correct.

code_under_review: import { Button, TextInput, Card, Modal, Menu, Select } from '@mantine/core';
review_summary: Mantine's CSS-in-JS infrastructure ships even for tree-shaken components. ~50KB minimum.

issues_found.title: Heavy base
issues_found.explanation: Tree-shaking works for components but base infra (Emotion/CSS-in-JS) included.

broader_pattern: Library base costs even with tree-shaking.

code_under_review:
<Suspense fallback={<Spinner />}>
  <DataComponent />  // throws on data error
</Suspense>
review_summary: Suspense catches throw of Promise (loading). Catches NOT thrown errors during render. Needs boundary.

issues_found.title: Errors uncaught
issues_found.explanation: Throw during render bubbles up.

fixed_code:
<ErrorBoundary fallback={<ErrorUI />}>
  <Suspense fallback={<Spinner />}>
    <DataComponent />
  </Suspense>
</ErrorBoundary>
